TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Ed_Beach, title = Ed_Beach, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ed_Beach} }

S.FORM: Ed Beach sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1929, ryax sa tay 25 nqu tay 1, Ed Beach, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1996) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Ed Beach sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1929, ryax sa tay 25 nqu tay 1, Ed Beach, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1996) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: e* βeaʦ~ʨħ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, e* βeaʦ~ʨħ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
